notes: Uninstall downloads the same Cloud data ZIP as Settings (quotes and invoices). Desktop shell keeps a signed-in session for that export.

history.notes: Uninstall downloads the same Cloud data ZIP as Settings (quotes and invoices). Desktop shell keeps a signed-in session for that export.
Desktop nav brand logo (aspect-matched), Settings/help aligned with frogswork.com support, faster business logo save.
Cloud desktop shell: opens app.frogswork.com, thicker left nav with account avatar and sign out, no PDF folder installer wizard.
Cloud upgrade banner, web signup URLs, forgot password and email verification on frogswork.com, PWA polish.
Fix in-app update check when a local dev API URL was saved in account settings. Subscribe and sign-in open in your default browser.
Major: subscribe and account signup on frogswork.com. Desktop and PWA sign in via web with token handoff; payment links no longer embedded in the app.
Fix logo placement editor height: meta minimum, dynamic slot, top-aligned bake matching PDF crop.
Logo editor: placement box hugs logo above divider; preview shows PDF side margins; header row height follows logo.
Logo editor: expandable placement area, wider header slot, PDF keeps logo position (full canvas bake).
Fix logo placement editor drag and preview controls.
Remove stale usage text from invoice delete confirm. Dashboard shows amount only with ex GST in brackets.

Logo size on PDFs matches the placement preview. Dashboard shows this-month and outstanding/paid totals with GST clearly labelled. Warn before leaving unsaved business or customer details. User-test guide: Greenfield Cafe is your business; Riverside Office is the customer.
GST line items: per-line GST applicable or GST-free toggle (default on); unit prices always ex GST. Fix GST tax invoice line table full width.
Fix business name editing on Your details and Edit business.
Fix subscribe and welcome wizard step counts (2 steps, not 3).
Add your business logo to invoices: upload an image, position it with a live header preview, and show it on PDF invoices. Toggle the logo on or off anytime.
Field validation, normalisation, cleaning; structured addresses; optional invoice logo; work-completed photos appendix; and post-save redirect to Home.
Fix in-app updater launch, immediate feedback, and logging.
Fix sign-in page copy; subscription model wording.
Fix in-app update restart and logging.
Live Stripe billing; use promo code EARLY100 for early access.
Enable Stripe subscribe flow (test mode).
Installer: honour PDF folder choice on upgrade; remove marked PDF folder on uninstall.
Installer: reliable uninstall PDF export, AppData cleanup, optional start at Windows logon.
Ensure fully cleans itself on app uninstall.
Replaces usage-based billing with subscription. Free trial: 20 invoices or 20000 ex GST before subscribe.
